subject: Cannot log in to my account
message: Hi, I've been trying to log in since this morning but keep getting an error saying my password is incorrect. I haven't changed it. Can you help?
resolution: Instructed customer to use password reset flow. Account was locked after failed attempts. Reset link sent successfully.

subject: Where is my invoice?
message: Hi, I need my invoice for October. Can you send it?
resolution: Directed customer to Settings → Billing → Invoices. Customer confirmed found.

subject: Request for full refund
message: We signed up for the Business plan last week but the product doesn't meet our requirements. I'd like a full refund please.
resolution: Billing team reviewed account. Refund approved under 14-day policy. Processed in 3 business days.

subject: This is completely unacceptable
message: I have been dealing with the same bug for THREE weeks. I have sent 4 emails and gotten no real help. This is absolutely unacceptable. I am seriously considering leaving Nexora and disputing the charge with my bank.
resolution: Senior agent called customer directly. Issue identified as a known bug, hotfix applied. Offered 1-month credit.

subject: SSO setup help
message: Hey, we're trying to set up SSO with Okta. Our IT team is stuck on the SAML configuration. Can someone help?
resolution: Forwarded to technical support. Provided SAML config guide. Issue resolved in a 30-min call.

subject: Legal complaint regarding data handling
message: I believe Nexora has mishandled our company's data in violation of GDPR. I have consulted with our attorney and we are prepared to take legal action if this is not addressed immediately.
resolution: Legal team and CS Manager responded within 1 hour. DPA reviewed. No breach found — customer received full data handling report.

subject: How do I connect Slack?
message: I'm trying to connect Nexora to Slack but I can't figure out where the integration is. Can you help?
resolution: Directed customer to Settings → Integrations → Slack. Confirmed connected.

subject: Competitor pricing match request
message: Hi team, I've been comparing Nexora with Asana and found their Business plan is 25% cheaper for our team size. Can you match their pricing? We'd prefer to stay with Nexora.
resolution: Account team offered 15% loyalty discount. Customer accepted. Contract renewed.
